name: Argentine Marinade
recipeInstructions:
1. Powder the saffron threads and steep them in lemon juice for 20 minutes.
2. Combine all ingredients with a whisk.
3. Store in a covered jar.
From "Wild About Saffron++A Contemporary Guide to an Ancient Spice", by Ellen Szita. Published by Saffron Rose, 28 John Glenn Circle, Daly City, Ca., 94105. 1987.
